title: Sysco Benefits From Inflation With Quick Inventory Turnover And Cost Pass-Through
text: Sysco is a Dividend King with 52 consecutive years of dividend growth. Shares currently yield 2.74%. Sysco weathered the pandemic storm and is coming out stronger on the other side.

title: Dividend Kings; 3 Stocks That Recently Made the Cut
text: Dividend Aristocrats are highly-respectable in their own right, but Dividend Kings take the throne. Several companies have recently made their way into the elite club.

title: My Best Dividend Aristocrats For October 2022
text: NOBL fell 2.78% in August which brings the Funds return for the year to a loss of 9.16%. Thus far, through September 23rd, the dividend aristocrat ETF is down 6.71%, bringing its year-to-date return to -15.25%.

title: Sysco: More Attractive With Its Remaining $4.5B Share Buyback Program
text: Sysco Corporation remains solid in its outstanding revenue growth, controlled margins, and profitability. Despite the aggressive acquisition this FY22, Sysco management provided a double-digit EPS growth outlook, which shows continued efficiency.

title: Sysco (SYY) Gains From Recipe for Growth, Diversified Business
text: Sysco (SYY) is focused on its Recipe for Growth plan, which, along with its diversified business, keeps it well-positioned. Meanwhile, elevated costs persist.

title: Sysco to Webcast Presentation at the Wells Fargo 5th Annual Consumer Conference
text: HOUSTON, Sept. 09, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Sysco Corporation (NYSE:SYY) today announced that the Company will webcast its presentation at the Wells Fargo 5th Annual Consumer Conference on Wednesday, Sept. 21, at 11:00 a.m. EDT.

title: Why Is Sysco (SYY) Up 1.4% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Sysco (SYY) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Naturally Splendid's Plantein entrees listed nationwide by wholesale distributor Sysco Canada
text: Naturally Splendid Enterprises Ltd. (TSX-V:NSP, OTC:NSPDF) announced that its Plantein products have been listed nationally by wholesale food distributor Sysco (NYSE:SYY) Canada.
